response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented full-stack engineer with strong testing culture and mentoring experience, but does not meet the core requirements of this role. The position demands 8 years of C++ and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/compute platforms, while the candidate's C++ exposure is limited and dated (LabWindows/CVI components and a bachelor thesis), with most experience in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. There is no internal cloud compute platform or formal cloud/DevOps technical-leadership background.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Demonstrated mentoring via workshops, courses, and dojos
Some distributed/low-latency experience (microservices at high request volume)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement; C++ work is minimal and old
No internal cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture experience
No formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
